content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty modestly positive (+0.23%) but breadth mixed — Metals/Energy/Pharma leading, PSU Banks weak (-1.12%), Bank Nifty -0.58%. VIX cooling (-5.3%) is supportive. Book is 60% deployed with positive unrealized P&L; priority is managing existing positions, not adding new exposure especially with 3 OPEN orders already pending.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -3.4% but Q4 was strong (+35% PAT, GNPA 1.45%). PSU bank sector weak today but fundamentals intact. CMP 78.88 well above SL 76.50 (room ~3%). Hold; thesis not broken."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Best performer +6.5%. SL already at 1032.38 (above entry 984, locks in ~5% gain). Position is well-managed; keep current SL and target — no change needed. Emitting HOLD instead.",
      "_note": "skip - no-op"
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "P&L +6.5%; SL already trailed to 1032.38 (locks in +4.9%). Target 1095 still ~4.4% away. Let it run — structure intact, MACD bullish, near 52w high. No SL change needed; current trail is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position -1.8%; gold consolidating after correction from ATH. SL 119 still 3.6% below CMP. Hedge thesis intact for portfolio diversification. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +1.8% to 1433.70, near 52-week high. Existing SL at 1418 is already at breakeven+. Q4 was blockbuster (+27% PAT). Targets unchanged. No-op detected — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.2%, Q4 results April 30 (binary event in 2 days, T+2). Street expectations soft, EBITDA margin compression expected. CMP 2312 above SL 2295 (room 0.7%). Consider exit before earnings if no recovery — but for now SL handles risk. Keep tight SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +1.4%, near 52w high (414.40). SL 406 already at breakeven+. P&L +1.4% — not yet at +2% trail trigger. Hold current levels — no-op MODIFY, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.3%, but stock made new 52w high earlier today (1816.60) before pulling back. SL 1775 only 0.3% below CMP 1770.20 — very tight, will likely be tested. If SL hits, controlled loss. Don't loosen. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1740.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +1.4% on Organon acquisition catalyst (largest Indian pharma deal ever). SL currently at 1734 (entry/breakeven). Tightening to 1740 to lock in marginal gain while letting the breakout breathe. Target 1830 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -0.7%, near 52w high. SL 318 only 0.4% below CMP — very tight but acceptable. Defensive transmission play, low beta. Hold; no SL change as P&L not yet at +2%."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Book already 60% deployed with 3 pending OPEN BUY orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) yet to fill. Adding more would risk over-deployment and cluster concentration. Capital preservation > new entries today."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PVRINOX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock up +4.19% with momentum but no urgent catalyst to chase. Book is 60% deployed with pending orders. Skip."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact (strong Q4); SL 76.50 gives ~3% room. Don't loosen, don't tighten yet."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1032.38 locking in ~4.9%. Let runner continue toward 1095 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; SL 119 (3.6% below CMP) appropriate given gold volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1418 already above entry 1412.94 — breakeven+ trail in place. Let it ride toward 1465."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 earnings April 30 is a binary event — current SL 2295 caps loss at ~3.3%. May reassess pre-earnings on next tick."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 406 (entry 404.50) is at breakeven+. Acceptable trail; not yet +2% to extend further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1775 very tight (0.3% below CMP). Likely to fill if weakness persists — controlled loss; don't loosen."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1740.00,
      "reasoning": "Organon catalyst + +1.4% — modest tightening to lock minimal gain while letting breakout develop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position near 52w high; SL 318 acceptable given low beta."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "COALINDIA, SUNPHARMA peer GLENMARK, TRENT (bonus issue), and CPSEETF remain interesting if cash frees up. PVRINOX showing momentum but no urgent trigger. INDUSTOWER/CUB watch for follow-through on next session.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio 60% deployed with 3 OPEN orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) still pending — total potential deployment near max. Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER + pending TATAPOWER) is now ~25% of book — at cluster discipline limit. NO new power names. Realized P&L is flat; book is still position-management phase. Priority: let winners run with appropriate trails, monitor HINDUNILVR pre-earnings risk April 30. Win rate 21% over 5 days is concerning — being more selective on entries is correct."
}
